name: Lendable
description: Consumer lending tech platform; internal ML/decision API exposed to partners.

seo.title: Lendable — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Lendable: Consumer lending tech platform; internal ML/decision API exposed to partners.

when_to_use: Consumer credit decisioning API for embedded lending partner integrations
ML-based credit underwriting exposed to white-label lending platform partners
BNPL and installment financing backend for consumer-facing products
Risk assessment API for fintech partners adding credit to their product

pros: Proven ML decisioning for consumer credit
Strong UK consumer lending track record
cons: Partner API is not widely available
Integration only for select fintech partners
review.verdict: Lending infrastructure, not a payments gateway — relevant only for partners embedding consumer credit.
review.best_for: UK fintechs and platforms embedding consumer lending decisions
review.not_for: Merchants or teams seeking payment acceptance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
